title: more ores, weapons and armor
description:
This mod mainly adds new weapons, ores, armors and tools.
Using JEI is recomended
body:
This mod adds mainly new weapons, armors and tools
There are 3 tiers:
Tier 1(early game):
Leather to iron armor, wood to iron tools, shield and the revolver
Tier 2(mid to late game):
Diamond to Titanium Tools/Armor, Explosive launcher, fire blaster, coroded netherite sword, flaming netheite sword
Tier 3(end game): Ion Blade, Power armor, Wither Blade and Dragon sceptre
